languages.text: "Как у вас, святош, все легко, да? Пара слов — и человек для тебя перестает быть человеком, он просто "дурная кровь", досадная помеха". {n}Яда в голосе Идиры хватит чтобы отравить целый полк.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Как у вас, святош, все легко, да? Пара слов — и человек для тебя перестает быть человеком, он просто "дурная кровь", досадная помеха". {n}Яда в голосе Идиры хватит чтобы отравить целый полк.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Как у вас, святош, все легко, да? Пара слов — и человек для тебя перестает быть человеком, он просто "дурная кровь", досадная помеха". {n}Яда в голосе Идиры хватит чтобы отравить целый полк.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, they turn into 'bad blood', a mere nuisance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, they turn into 'bad blood', a mere nuisance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Das Leben muss so einfach sein für euch scheinheilige Prediger. Ein paar Worte, und ihr seht nicht mehr einen Menschen, sondern 'böses Blut', ein lästiges Hindernis." {n}In Idiras Stimme liegt genug Gift, um ein ganzes Regiment zu vergiften.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben muss so einfach sein für euch scheinheilige Prediger. Ein paar Worte, und ihr seht nicht mehr einen Menschen, sondern 'böses Blut', ein lästiges Hindernis." {n}In Idiras Stimme liegt genug Gift, um ein ganzes Regiment zu vergiften.{/n}

languages.text: "La vie doit être si facile pour vous, prêcheurs moralisateurs. Quelques mots, et vous ne voyez plus une personne, vous voyez du 'mauvais sang', un obstacle gênant." {n}Il y a assez de venin dans la voix d'Idira pour empoisonner un régiment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "La vie doit être si facile pour vous, prêcheurs moralisateurs. Quelques mots, et vous ne voyez plus une personne, vous voyez du 'mauvais sang', un obstacle gênant." {n}Il y a assez de venin dans la voix d'Idira pour empoisonner un régiment.{/n}

languages.text: "La vida debe ser tan fácil para ustedes, predicadores santurrones. Un par de palabras y ya no ves a una persona, ves 'mala sangre', un estorbo molesto". {n}Hay suficiente veneno en la voz de Idira como para envenenar a un regimiento.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "La vida debe ser tan fácil para ustedes, predicadores santurrones. Un par de palabras y ya no ves a una persona, ves 'mala sangre', un estorbo molesto". {n}Hay suficiente veneno en la voz de Idira como para envenenar a un regimiento.{/n}

languages.text: "Siz sofu vaizler için hayat çok kolay olmalı. Birkaç kelime ve artık bir insan görmüyorsunuz, 'kötü kan' görüyorsunuz, can sıkıcı bir engel." {n}Idira'nın sesinde bir alayı zehirlemeye yetecek kadar zehir var.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Life must be so easy for you sanctimonious preachers. A couple of words, and you no longer see a person, you see 'bad blood,' an annoying hindrance." {n}There is enough venom in Idira's voice to poison a regiment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Siz sofu vaizler için hayat çok kolay olmalı. Birkaç kelime ve artık bir insan görmüyorsunuz, 'kötü kan' görüyorsunuz, can sıkıcı bir engel." {n}Idira'nın sesinde bir alayı zehirlemeye yetecek kadar zehir var.{/n}
